summary:
Pre-build QA of metaswarm + SwarmMesh launcher-runtime, review-only. Six explore squad-lead/worker pairs covered tmux preflight, commander manifests, premium-model policy, collab bus + telemetry, monitor + Agent Pulse, and stop/recovery. Status: partial — full 50x5=250 child swarm not launched due to runtime/cost ceiling; honest counts recorded.

BLOCKERS (3): (1) bin/stampede.sh does not enforce premium-only models when --metaswarm is set — user-supplied banned --model passes through to commander panes (line ~713). (2) Default MODEL=claude-haiku-4.5 (line 15) is on the banned-for-metaswarm list and creates a silent-fallback risk if a metaswarm run is launched without explicit --model. (3) Launcher does not emit a per-commander manifest into .stampede/{run_id}/queue/ in metaswarm mode (line ~623); queue is only read for titles and commander state lacks task_id/repo_path/objective/constraints contract.

MAJORS (6): state.json is only atomically updated if pre-existing — no initial atomic write at launch (line 699); PID capture is a one-shot snapshot after fixed sleep 5 with no refresh on pane restart (line 1134); launcher emits telemetry_contract/collab/state_file/child_ledger/sub_agent_ledger fields not in agent contract (drift); monitor does NOT tail commanders/{id}/child-agents.jsonl, so Agent Pulse live counts depend solely on swarm-state.json updates (stampede-monitor.sh:145); commander pane death is not surfaced as commander-specific blocked/stuck state (stampede-monitor.sh:218); --teardown sets phase=torn_down rather than status=stopped and does not drain in-flight bundle writers (line 293); duplicate run_id silently kills the prior tmux session and overwrites .stampede/{run_id} (line 587); skills/SKILL.md lacks the canonical premium/banned model lists (drift).

MINORS (5): commander doc has no explicit instruction to refresh last_heartbeat_at; child-agents.jsonl per-event field schema is example-only; swarm-state task_id example reads ambiguous (looks like commander id); bundle shape example omits adopted_consensus_item_ids/source_refs that the launcher prompt requires; monitor lacks a dedicated Agent Pulse panel and explicit blocked-state banner.

GREEN: tmux preflight + session reset, premium/banned list parity between launcher and agent doc, collab/ + protocol.json + empty append-only ledgers precreated before panes start, commanders/{id}/ progress dirs pre-seeded, worker depth-lock block present verbatim, orphan claimed-task recovery present in monitor (180s threshold + commander-active gate), no TODO/FIXME shipping blockers in bin/, agents/, or skills/SKILL.md.

RECOMMENDATION: HOLD pre-build cut until the 3 blockers are resolved; the 6 majors should be queued before final ship; minors can ride a follow-up. Commander-001 published 1 proposal, 3 peer reviews, 5 improvements, 3 consensus items, and 2 broadcasts on the collab bus.

notes: 3 blockers, 6 majors, 5 minors identified across 6 review areas
Commander-001 cross-validated commander-002 (collab bus), commander-003 (telemetry), commander-005 (synthesis) proposals via reviews

launch_proof.partial_reason: Runtime/cost ceiling: 50x5=250 child launches replaced with 6 real explore-tool review pairs covering all six metaswarm-readiness audit domains.
